name.description: The local image name produced by the build.

from.description: Base Tart image to clone, e.g. ghcr.io/cirruslabs/macos-sequoia-xcode:latest

xcode.description: Select active Xcode → sudo xcodes select <version>.

node.description: Node version — fnm install/default + corepack + a stable /usr/local/bin node symlink. Quote bare majors ("20").

ruby.description: Ruby version — rbenv install + global + shims + bundler.

python.description: Python version — pyenv install + global + pip upgrade.

java.description: OpenJDK major version — brew install openjdk@<v> + JavaVirtualMachines symlink.

rust.description: Rust toolchain — rustup toolchain install + default (e.g. stable).

package-manager.description: JS package manager. pnpm/yarn via corepack; bun via brew.

xcode-first-launch.description: Run sudo xcodebuild -runFirstLaunch to install Xcode components headlessly.

simulator-runtimes.description: Download simulator runtimes by platform (xcodebuild -downloadPlatform). E.g. ["iOS 26"].

warm-simulators.description: Simulator devices to cold-boot once (warms on-disk caches), then shut down. E.g. ["iPhone 17 Pro"].

env.description: Environment variables — exported for the build + persisted to /etc/zshenv.

known-hosts.description: Pre-seed SSH host keys via ssh-keyscan into ~/.ssh/known_hosts.

write.description: Files to write into the guest, keyed by path (contents as the value).

pod-repo-warm.description: Warm the CocoaPods spec repo (pod repo update / setup).

prefetch.description: Cache-warming commands, run in the repo mount dir.

repos.description: Clone repos into the guest to warm global caches (yarn/CocoaPods/bundler), then discard the source. No source is baked.

ref.description: Branch or tag to clone (shallow; SHAs not supported).

run.description: Install commands run in the clone to warm caches.

ssh-key.description: Guest path to an SSH key for private clones (e.g. a read-only mounted key — mounts are not baked into the image).

verify.description: Assertions run at the end — each must exit 0 or the build fails.

cleanup.description: brew cleanup + clear caches at the end (smaller image).

cpu.description: CPU count for the baked image (tart set --cpu).

disk.description: Disk size in GB, grow-only (tart set --disk-size).

run.description: Escape hatch: raw bash. A `|` block (one script) or a list of steps. Runs after the declarative fields.

script.description: Path (relative to this recipe) to a shell script run in the guest. Runs before run.

network.description: VM networking: nat (default), bridged:<iface> (e.g. behind Zscaler), or softnet.

mounts.description: Host directories shared into the build VM.

name.description: Mount tag → /Volumes/My Shared Files/<name> in the guest.
